codeReview.summary: Implementation of CreativeCyclePhase and Orientation dynamics is complete and correct. All 25 tests pass, threshold parameters are fully configurable, types derive required traits, and edge cases are handled properly. The code follows established patterns from existing dynamics and adheres to AGENTS.md conventions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly uses keyword-based heuristics for orientation detection (creative_keywords, problem_keywords, reactive_keywords). This approach is documented in code comments but could benefit from a note in .factory/library/architecture.md about the heuristic-based nature of orientation classification being a v1 implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:1170-1210 - classify_single_tension_orientation function uses hardcoded keyword lists. This is appropriate for initial implementation but may need ML-based enhancement later.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure was followed correctly - TDD approach with tests written first, all expected behaviors covered, and comprehensive edge case handling (empty mutations, single mutations, threshold variations).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows 25 tests added covering all phase states, orientation types, threshold sensitivity, and trait implementations. Test names are descriptive per AGENTS.md conventions: test_phase_germination_for_new_tension_no_mutations, test_orientation_problem_solving_for_fix_negative_tensions, etc.

summary: CreativeCyclePhase and Orientation dynamics fully implemented with 25 passing tests. CreativeCyclePhase correctly classifies tensions into Germination/Assimilation/Completion/Momentum phases based on mutation count, convergence ratio, and recent resolution detection. Orientation classifies patterns as Creative/ProblemSolving/ReactiveResponsive using keyword heuristics across multiple tensions. All threshold parameters are injectable (zero hardcoded constants in classification logic). Types properly derive Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize, Send, Sync. Edge cases handled: empty/single mutation history returns gracefully without panic. Commit 3abe115 is clean with focused changes to dynamics.rs and lib.rs re-exports.
